name: @torus-oss/saga
description: YAML-driven scenario runner with pluggable dispatch, verification, trajectories, outcome adapters, and persona evolution.

scripts.test:examples: bun run build && bun test --timeout 15000 examples/tickets/src/__tests__/
scripts.smoke:dist: bun -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(m => { if (!m.runSagaCore || !m.MatcherRegistry) throw new Error('dist export smoke failed') })"
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run test:examples && bun run smoke:dist && bun run pack:dry-run
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run build && tsc -p examples/tickets/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run test:examples
